assertions.title: Platform UI updated - index.html and final-study-platform.html include all new categories and lecture modules in their navigation and displays

steps.action: Search for '8 detailed modules' and '14 detailed modules' text
steps.expected: Both files should say '14 detailed modules'
steps.observed: index.html line 1471 says '14 detailed modules' (CORRECT); final-study-platform.html line 1471 says '8 detailed modules' (INCORRECT - should be '14')

steps.action: Count topic-badge divs in the lecture display section
steps.observed: index.html has 14 topic-badges (lines 1474-1487) - CORRECT; final-study-platform.html has only 8 topic-badges (lines 1474-1481) - INCORRECT, missing 6 new modules

steps.action: Verify JavaScript data arrays have 14 categories
steps.expected: categories array should include all 14 categories
steps.observed: Both files have correct JavaScript data: final-study-platform.html line 2051 and index.html line 1751 show categories = ['internet', 'html', 'css-fundamentals', 'css-layout', 'js-basics', 'js-control-flow', 'js-functions', 'js-objects', 'js-classes', 'js-dom', 'js-events', 'html-forms', 'css-responsive', 'web-apis']

steps.action: Verify modules array includes new modules
steps.expected: modules array should include js-classes, js-dom, js-events, html-forms, css-responsive, web-apis
steps.observed: Both files have correct modules data: final-study-platform.html lines 2072-2077 and index.html lines 1772-1777 show all 6 new modules

steps.action: Check for presence of new category strings in files
steps.expected: New category identifiers should exist in JavaScript data
steps.observed: All 6 new categories found: js-classes, js-dom, js-events, html-forms, css-responsive, web-apis present in both files' JavaScript data

final-study-platform.html.line1471: Says '8 detailed modules' instead of '14 detailed modules'
final-study-platform.html.line2051: JavaScript categories array correctly has 14 items
final-study-platform.html.lines2072-2077: JavaScript modules array correctly has all 6 new modules

index.html.line1751: JavaScript categories array correctly has 14 items
index.html.lines1772-1777: JavaScript modules array correctly has all 6 new modules

assertions.issues: final-study-platform.html has DISPLAY inconsistency - the static HTML content at lines 1471-1481 only shows 8 modules instead of 14. The JavaScript data is correctly updated, but the hardcoded HTML display text and topic-badges were not updated to show all 14 modules. This is the bug that was mentioned in the previously known issue.

summary: Tested VAL-PLATFORM-001: Platform UI updated with 14 categories. The assertion FAILS for final-study-platform.html because the static HTML display (lines 1471-1481) still shows '8 detailed modules' with only 8 topic-badges, when it should show '14 detailed modules' with all 14 topic-badges. The JavaScript data (categories and modules arrays) IS correctly updated to 14 items. index.html is CORRECT - it properly displays 14 detailed modules and all 14 topic-badges.
